mapper.select: SELECT * FROM leave_balance WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND year = #{year}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_balance (employee_id, leave_type, total_days, used_days, remaining_days, year, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{leaveType}, #{totalDays}, #{usedDays}, #{remainingDays}, #{year}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_balance SET total_days = #{totalDays}, used_days = #{usedDays}, remaining_days = #{remainingDays}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_balance (employee_id, leave_type, total_days, used_days, remaining_days, year, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{employeeId}, 1, #{totalDays}, 0, #{totalDays}, #{year}, NOW(), NOW())
